title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.052 - Additional incidental fees — disclosure to applicant or insured
text:
375.052.  Additional incidental fees — disclosure to applicant or insured. — An insurer or insurance producer may charge additional incidental fees for premium installments, late payments, policy reinstatements, or other similar services specifically provided for by law or regulation.  Such fees shall be disclosed to the applicant or insured in writing.
(L. 2001 S.B. 193) 
Incidental fees, additional, may be charged, when, disclosure to insured, 379.356
